segments.text: Out of the depths I cry to you, Lord;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lord, hear my voice. Let your ears be attentive to my cry for mercy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If you, Lord, kept a record of sins, Lord, who could stand?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: with you there is forgiveness, so that we can, with reverence, serve you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I wait for the Lord, my whole being waits, and in his word I put my hope.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I wait for the Lord more than watchmen wait for the morning, more than watchmen wait for the morning.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Israel, put your hope in the Lord, for with the Lord is unfailing love and with him is full redemption.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He himself will redeem Israel from all their sins.
